title: [FATAL] [lib.rs:478] ["Multiplication resulted in NaN: FloatIsNan"]
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)

<!-- a step by step guide for reproducing the bug. -->
```sql
CREATE TABLE t1 (c1 DOUBLE);
INSERT INTO t1 VALUES (1.0E308);
SELECT c1 FROM t1 WHERE RADIANS(c1) * 0;
```
### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)
Normal execution.
### 3. What did you see instead (Required)
The server crashed.
### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

<!-- Paste the output of SELECT tidb_version() -->
Release Version: v8.3.0
Edition: Community
Git Commit Hash: 1a0c3ac3292fff7742faa0c00a662ccb66ba40db
Git Branch: HEAD
UTC Build Time: 2024-08-20 10:13:01
GoVersion: go1.21.10
Race Enabled: false
Check Table Before Drop: false
Store: tikv
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2 (c1 DOUBLE, c2 INTEGER DEFAULT 0);
INSERT INTO t2 (c1, c2) VALUES (1.0E308, NULL);
SELECT c1, RADIANS(c1) * 0 AS radians_result FROM t2 WHERE c2 IS NULL;
CREATE TABLE t3 (c1 FLOAT, c2 VARCHAR(255));
key_bug_features: RADIANS function with extreme double value causes NaN
